title: Radical Cobblemon Trainer Textures Plus
description: A resource pack for the latest version of the Radical Cobblemon Trainers mod.
body:
Trainer skins for the latest version of Radical Cobblemon Trainers.  

**Get notified about updates on Discord** - [https://discord.com/channels/934267676354834442/1293646145268092978](https://discord.com/channels/934267676354834442/1293646145268092978)  

Let me know (**_@forestfire5129_** on Discord) if any textures render improperly.  
This texture pack features a variety of trainer skins, blending both original work and contributions from the talented community.  
**Also available on CurseForge:** https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/rct-trainer-textures-plus/files  

 **Acknowledgments:**  
A huge thank you to **_@hdainester_** for the original mod and to ***matcher\_*** (on Discord) for providing many of the base textures and formatting used in this pack. I’ve also added 183 original textures to further enhance and diversify the collection.  
**DISCLAIMER:** The skins included here are the work of their respective creators, not my own. If you spot a skin that belongs to you and would like it modified or credited, please feel free to contact me. I’ll be happy to make the necessary changes or give credit here in the description.  
**OPTIONAL:** Support me on Ko-Fi using this link to make the hours of effort worth it! https://ko-fi.com/forestfire
